vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. Across all time-stamped frames, the pots remain devoid of the expected botanical specimens (P1-P4). The soil appears uniform and undisturbed, suggesting that the plants have either been removed, failed to germinate, or suffered total systemic loss prior to the start of this observation window. The environment is currently a sterile soil-based system.
